subject: HelioGrid pilot follow-up and safety review
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Maya and Felix,

By Wednesday, May 20, we will send the grid safety review packet. For the pilot plan, we will configure operator-approved recommendations and a simulation workspace for the May 29 tabletop exercise. On the live-dispatch question, we can explore a live-dispatch path for the pilot once Safety confirms the boundary.

We will also include audit log export planning for June 3 so Priya can review operator decision evidence.

Best,
Rowan

subject: Re: HelioGrid pilot follow-up and safety review
bodyMarkdown: Thanks Rowan. HelioGrid will send the redacted dispatch rules and two sample event logs by Friday, May 22. We still need a clear yes/no on whether any automatic dispatch can occur during the pilot. Please keep the May 29 tabletop exercise in the plan.

subject: Internal note: HelioGrid boundary
bodyMarkdown: Internal note: do not write that live dispatch is available. The approved wording is simulation plus operator approval only until Safety signs a separate amendment.
